---
title: "Jane Frances Pearson"
---

## Jane Frances Pearson

**Dates:** (b. Berks. 1846)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling with one (or perhaps both of her two sisters,  Frances Margaret and Mary Anne Pearson, as ‘Double Daisy’, 1869- 1876.  They were daughters of the Rev. Thomas Pearson (d. 1873), Vicar of Market Lavington, Devizes;  after his death they lived at The Old House, Market Lavington [his will]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept  3d [1881]
- Letter from June 17th 1878
- Letter from Oct 12th [1871?]
- Letter from Aug 29th [1871?] 
- Letter from May 31 st [1870] 
- Letter from May 9th [1870] 
- Letter from March 2 [1870]
- Letter from Jany 28th  [1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
